---
title: "session4"
author: "jolynecujoh233"
date: "2026-03-16"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    toc: true
always_allow_html: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 9, fig.height = 5)
options(max.print = 80)
tmap::tmap_options(component.autoscale = FALSE)
```


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)
library(sf)
library(tmap)
library(maptiles)
library(scales)
library(ggrepel)

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))

pal <- c(
  nus_blue   = "#003D7C",
  blue       = "#2E75B6",
  nus_orange = "#EF7C00",
  ice        = "#D6E8F7",
  grey       = "#6B7D8C"
)

# Official TEL colour: #9B5E25 (brown)
TEL_BROWN <- "#9B5E25"
# Official NSL colour: #D42E12 (red)
NSL_RED <- "#D42E12"
```






```{r install, eval=FALSE}
install.packages(c("sf", "tmap", "maptiles", "ggrepel"))
```






```{r load-raw, include=FALSE}
hdb_raw <- read_csv(
  "data/Resale flat prices based on registration date from Jan-2017 onwards.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

hdb_pre <- hdb_raw %>%
  mutate(
    date      = ym(month),
    year      = year(date),
    price_psm = resale_price / floor_area_sqm
  )
```






```{r motivating-plot-1}
woodlands_trend <- hdb_pre %>%
  filter(town == "WOODLANDS", year >= 2017) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(mean_psm = mean(price_psm), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(woodlands_trend, aes(x = year, y = mean_psm)) +
  geom_line(colour = pal["nus_blue"], linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(colour = pal["nus_blue"], size = 3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 2020, linetype = "dashed",
             colour = pal["nus_blue"], linewidth = 0.9) +
  annotate("label", x = 2020.1, y = min(woodlands_trend$mean_psm) * 1.02,
           label = "TEL Stage 1 opens\n31 Jan 2020",
           hjust = 0, size = 3.2, colour = pal["nus_blue"],
           fill = "white", label.size = 0.3) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2017:2025) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar_format(prefix = "$", big.mark = ","), limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title   = "Mean HDB resale price per sqm, 2017–2025 | Woodlands",
    x       = NULL,
    y       = "Mean price per sqm ($)",
    caption = "Data: HDB."
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
```







```{r motivating-plot-2}
two_towns <- hdb_pre %>%
  filter(town %in% c("WOODLANDS", "YISHUN"), year >= 2017) %>%
  group_by(town, year) %>%
  summarise(mean_psm = mean(price_psm), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(town_label = str_to_title(town))

ggplot(two_towns, aes(x = year, y = mean_psm,
                      colour = town_label, group = town_label)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 2020, linetype = "dashed",
             colour = pal["nus_blue"], linewidth = 0.8) +
  annotate("label", x = 2020.1,
           y = max(two_towns$mean_psm) * 0.985,
           label = "TEL opens in\nWoodlands only",
           hjust = 0, size = 3.2, colour = pal[["nus_blue"]],
           fill = "white", label.size = 0.3) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("Woodlands" = pal[["nus_blue"]], "Yishun" = pal[["nus_orange"]])
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2017:2025) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar_format(prefix = "$", big.mark = ","), limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Mean HDB resale price per sqm, 2017–2025 | Woodlands and Yishun",
    subtitle = "Yishun received no new MRT stations in this period",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Mean price per sqm ($)",
    colour   = NULL,
    caption  = "Data: HDB."
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```





```{r load-data}
hdb <- hdb_raw %>%
  mutate(
    date            = ym(month),
    year            = year(date),
    price_psm       = resale_price / floor_area_sqm,
    storey_lo       = str_extract(storey_range, "^\\d+") %>% as.numeric(),
    storey_hi       = str_extract(storey_range, "\\d+$") %>% as.numeric(),
    storey_mid      = (storey_lo + storey_hi) / 2,
    remaining_lease = 99 - (year - lease_commence_date),
    blk_no          = str_to_upper(str_trim(block)),
    street_name     = str_to_upper(str_trim(street_name))
  )

cat("HDB transactions loaded:", nrow(hdb), "\n")
cat("Date range:             ", format(min(hdb$date), "%b %Y"), "–",
    format(max(hdb$date), "%b %Y"), "\n")
```






```{r load-blocks}
# Block geocodes — pre-built from OneMap, one row per unique HDB block
hdb_blocks <- read_csv("data/hdb_blocks.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    blk_no      = str_to_upper(str_trim(blk_no)),
    street_name = str_to_upper(str_trim(street_name))
  ) %>%
  select(blk_no, street_name, lat, lon)

# Convert to sf and project to SVY21 for metre-based distance calculations
blocks_sf <- hdb_blocks %>%
  drop_na(lat, lon) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326) %>%
  st_transform(crs = 3414)

cat("Geocoded blocks:", nrow(blocks_sf), "\n")
```






```{r mrt-stations}
mrt_raw <- read_sf("data/TrainStation_Mar2026/RapidTransitSystemStation.shp") %>%
  filter(!str_detect(STN_NAM_DE, "DEPOT")) %>%
  st_transform(crs = 3414) %>%
  st_centroid()

glimpse(mrt_raw)
```






```{r mrt-stations-clean}
# STN_NAM_DE contains the full station name (e.g. "WOODLANDS MRT STATION").
# Interchange stations appear as one polygon per line in the shapefile, so
# a station like Woodlands (NSL/TEL) has two rows. We keep one row per
# unique station name after stripping the suffix.
mrt_stations <- mrt_raw %>%
  mutate(
    station = str_to_title(
      str_remove(STN_NAM_DE, " MRT STATION$| LRT STATION$")
    )
  ) %>%
  distinct(station, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  select(station, everything())

cat("MRT/LRT stations loaded:", nrow(mrt_stations), "\n")
```







```{r tel-line}
# --- Station identification ---
tel_stage1_names <- c("Woodlands North", "Woodlands", "Woodlands South")

tel_stage1_sf <- mrt_stations %>%
  filter(station %in% tel_stage1_names)

cat("TEL Stage 1 stations found:", nrow(tel_stage1_sf), "\n")
tel_stage1_sf %>% select(station)
```








```{r tel-geometry}
# --- Stage 1 solid line: TE1 to TE2 to TE3 ---
# Derive directly from the shapefile geometries already loaded in tel_stage1_sf.
# mrt_stations already holds centroid points (st_centroid() applied on load).
# Sorting by latitude descending gives the correct North to South order:
# TE1 Woodlands North, TE2 Woodlands, TE3 Woodlands South.
tel_stage1_pts <- tel_stage1_sf %>%
  mutate(lat_coord = st_coordinates(.)[, "Y"]) %>%
  arrange(desc(lat_coord))

tel_line_stage1 <- tel_stage1_pts %>%
  summarise(geometry = st_combine(geometry)) %>%
  st_cast("LINESTRING")

# --- Stage 2 dashed continuation ---
# TEL Stage 2 opened 28 Aug 2021; Springleaf (TE4) and Lentor (TE5) are
# the two Stage 2 stations nearest to Woodlands. 
tel_stage2_visible <- c("Springleaf", "Lentor")

tel_stage2_pts <- mrt_stations %>%
  filter(station %in% tel_stage2_visible) %>%
  mutate(lat_coord = st_coordinates(.)[, "Y"]) %>%
  arrange(desc(lat_coord))   # N to S: Springleaf then Lentor

te3_pt <- tel_stage1_pts %>%
  filter(station == "Woodlands South") %>%
  select(geometry)

tel_line_stage2 <- bind_rows(te3_pt, tel_stage2_pts %>% select(geometry)) %>%
  summarise(geometry = st_combine(geometry)) %>%
  st_cast("LINESTRING")

# --- Annotation label points ---
te1_xy <- tel_stage1_pts %>%
  filter(station == "Woodlands North") %>%
  st_coordinates()

te4_xy <- mrt_stations %>%
  filter(station == "Springleaf") %>%
  st_coordinates()

tel_annotations <- tibble(
  label = c("TEL Stage 1 (Jan 2020)", "TEL Stage 2 (Aug 2021)"),
  X     = c(te1_xy[1, "X"] - 900,    # 900 m west of TE1 Woodlands North
             te4_xy[1, "X"] - 300),   # 300 m west of TE4 Springleaf
  Y     = c(te1_xy[1, "Y"] + 400,    # 400 m north of TE1
             te4_xy[1, "Y"] + 300)    # 300 m north of TE4
) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("X", "Y"), crs = 3414)
```









```{r nsl-line}
# All NSL stations relevant to northern SG
# We filter them from mrt_stations

# Correct sequence along the NSL
nsl_sequence <- c("Marsiling", "Woodlands", "Admiralty",
                  "Sembawang", "Canberra", "Yishun", "Khatib")

# Stations within the three study towns (Woodlands, Sembawang, Yishun)
nsl_in_scope_names <- c("Woodlands", "Admiralty", "Sembawang", "Canberra", "Yishun")

nsl_stations_sf <- mrt_stations %>%
  filter(station %in% nsl_sequence) %>%
  mutate(
    in_scope   = station %in% nsl_in_scope_names,
    line_order = match(station, nsl_sequence)
  ) %>%
  arrange(line_order)

# Solid line for the relevant portion of the NSL (Marsiling through Khatib)
nsl_line_solid <- nsl_stations_sf %>%
  summarise(geometry = st_combine(geometry)) %>%
  st_cast("LINESTRING")

# Dashed extensions — use the actual next stations on the NSL
# Kranji is the next station of Marsiling; Ang Mo Kio is the next of Khatib.
marsiling_pt <- nsl_stations_sf %>% filter(station == "Marsiling") %>% select(geometry)
kranji_pt    <- mrt_stations    %>% filter(station == "Kranji")     %>% select(geometry)
khatib_pt    <- nsl_stations_sf %>% filter(station == "Khatib")     %>% select(geometry)
angmokio_pt  <- mrt_stations    %>% filter(station == "Ang Mo Kio") %>% select(geometry)

nsl_ext_north <- bind_rows(marsiling_pt, kranji_pt) %>%
  summarise(geometry = st_combine(geometry)) %>%
  st_cast("LINESTRING")

nsl_ext_south <- bind_rows(khatib_pt, angmokio_pt) %>%
  summarise(geometry = st_combine(geometry)) %>%
  st_cast("LINESTRING")

# Station name vectors used later to control map layers
nsl_in_scope  <- nsl_stations_sf %>% filter( in_scope) %>% pull(station)
nsl_ghost     <- nsl_stations_sf %>% filter(!in_scope) %>% pull(station)
nsl_all_names <- nsl_stations_sf$station
```







```{r block-distances}
# Full n_blocks × n_stations distance matrix
dist_mat     <- st_distance(blocks_sf, mrt_stations)

nearest_dist <- apply(dist_mat, 1, min)
nearest_idx  <- apply(dist_mat, 1, which.min)

blocks_proximity <- hdb_blocks %>%
  mutate(
    dist_to_mrt_m   = as.numeric(nearest_dist),
    nearest_station = mrt_stations$station[nearest_idx]
  )

glimpse(blocks_proximity)
summary(blocks_proximity$dist_to_mrt_m)
```







```{r join-distances}
hdb <- hdb %>%
  left_join(
    blocks_proximity %>%
      select(blk_no, street_name, dist_to_mrt_m, nearest_station),
    by = c("blk_no", "street_name")
  )

glimpse(hdb)
```







```{r proximity-scatter}
hdb_sample <- hdb %>%
  filter(year == 2025, flat_type == "4 ROOM", !is.na(dist_to_mrt_m))

ggplot(hdb_sample,
       aes(x = dist_to_mrt_m / 1000, y = price_psm)) +
  geom_point(colour = pal[["nus_blue"]], alpha = 0.07, size = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", colour = pal["nus_orange"],
              se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = label_number(suffix = " km"),
    limits = c(0, NA)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = dollar_format(prefix = "$", big.mark = ","),
    limits = c(0, NA)
    ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Distance to nearest MRT station vs price per sqm",
    subtitle = "All sold HDB 4-room flats in the city. Each point is a transaction",
    x        = "Distance to nearest MRT/LRT station (km)",
    y        = "Price per sqm ($)",
    caption  = "Data: HDB, LTA, SLA."
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
```







```{r proximity-regression}
prox_model <- lm(
  price_psm ~ dist_to_mrt_m + storey_mid + remaining_lease,
  data = hdb_sample
)

summary(prox_model)
```





```{r map-prep}
set.seed(42)

northern_towns <- c("WOODLANDS", "SEMBAWANG", "YISHUN")

hdb_north_map <- hdb %>%
  filter(year == 2025, town %in% northern_towns, !is.na(dist_to_mrt_m)) %>%
  left_join(
    hdb_blocks %>%
      bind_cols(
        st_coordinates(blocks_sf) %>%
          as_tibble() %>%
          rename(x_svy21 = X, y_svy21 = Y)
      ),
    by = c("blk_no", "street_name")
  ) %>%
  drop_na(x_svy21) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x_svy21", "y_svy21"), crs = 3414) %>%
  slice_sample(n = 2000)

# Load URA planning area boundaries
planning_areas <- read_sf("data/MasterPlan2019PlanningAreaBoundaryNoSea.geojson") %>%
  st_transform(crs = 3414)

# Filter to our three study towns
if ("PLN_AREA_N" %in% names(planning_areas)) {
  northern_areas <- planning_areas %>%
    filter(PLN_AREA_N %in% northern_towns)
} else {
  # Fallback if field name differs — print columns to diagnose
  cat("Planning area columns:", paste(names(planning_areas), collapse = ", "), "\n")
  name_col <- names(planning_areas)[1]
  northern_areas <- planning_areas %>%
    filter(toupper(.data[[name_col]]) %in% northern_towns)
}

cat("Planning areas matched:", nrow(northern_areas), "\n")
glimpse(hdb_north_map)
```







```{r map-prep2}
# Download basemap tiles for the extent we are focusing on
map_bbox <- hdb_north_map %>%
  st_bbox() %>%
  st_as_sfc() %>%
  st_buffer(1500) %>%
  st_transform(4326)

basemap <- get_tiles(map_bbox, provider = "CartoDB.Positron",
                     zoom = 13, crop = TRUE)

# All MRT stations in the map area
mrt_north <- mrt_stations %>%
  st_filter(map_bbox %>% st_transform(3414) %>% st_as_sf())
glimpse(mrt_north)
```








```{r map-static}
tmap_mode("plot")

tm_shape(basemap) +
  tm_rgb() +
  # -- Neighbourhood outlines and labels --
  tm_shape(northern_areas) +
  tm_borders(col = "grey30", lwd = 1.4) +
  tm_text("PLN_AREA_N", col = "grey15", size = 0.72, fontface = "bold",
          bg.color = "white", bg.alpha = 0.55) +
  # -- HDB transaction dots --
  tm_shape(hdb_north_map) +
  tm_dots(
    col     = "price_psm",
    palette = c("#D6E8F7", "#2E75B6", pal["nus_blue"]),
    style   = "quantile",
    size    = 0.05,
    alpha   = 0.6,
    title   = "Price per sqm ($)"
  ) +
  # ---- NSL (faint — secondary context) ------------------------------------ #
  tm_shape(nsl_ext_south) +
  tm_lines(col = NSL_RED, lwd = 1.5, lty = "dashed", alpha = 0.22) +
  tm_shape(nsl_ext_north) +
  tm_lines(col = NSL_RED, lwd = 1.5, lty = "dashed", alpha = 0.22) +
  # Solid corridor
  tm_shape(nsl_line_solid) +
  tm_lines(col = NSL_RED, lwd = 2, alpha = 0.30) +
  # Out-of-study-area stations (Khatib, Marsiling)
  tm_shape(nsl_stations_sf %>% filter(!in_scope)) +
  tm_dots(col = "white", size = 0.18, shape = 21,
          border.col = NSL_RED, border.lwd = 1, alpha = 0.35) +
  tm_text("station", col = NSL_RED, size = 0.38, alpha = 0.45,
          ymod = 0.7, fontface = "italic") +
  # In-scope NSL stations (excl. Woodlands — handled on TEL layer below)
  tm_shape(nsl_stations_sf %>% filter(in_scope, station != "Woodlands")) +
  tm_dots(col = NSL_RED, size = 0.22, shape = 21,
          border.col = "white", border.lwd = 1, alpha = 0.40) +
  tm_text("station", col = NSL_RED, size = 0.42, alpha = 0.60,
          ymod = 0.80, fontface = "plain",
          bg.color = "white", bg.alpha = 0.60) +
  # ---- TEL (primary focus) ------------------------------------------------ #
  # Stage 2 dashed continuation
  tm_shape(tel_line_stage2) +
  tm_lines(col = TEL_BROWN, lwd = 2.2, lty = "dashed", alpha = 0.70) +
  # Stage 1 solid line
  tm_shape(tel_line_stage1) +
  tm_lines(col = TEL_BROWN, lwd = 4, alpha = 0.95) +
  # TE1 and TE3 (Woodlands North / Woodlands South): circle dots
  tm_shape(tel_stage1_sf %>% filter(station != "Woodlands")) +
  tm_dots(col = TEL_BROWN, size = 0.55, shape = 21,
          border.col = "white", border.lwd = 2) +
  tm_text("station", col = TEL_BROWN, size = 0.60, fontface = "bold",
          xmod = 1.05, ymod = 0.10,
          bg.color = "white", bg.alpha = 0.75) +
  # TE2 / Woodlands interchange: square to signal interchange; label to the right
  tm_shape(nsl_stations_sf %>% filter(station == "Woodlands")) +
  tm_dots(col = TEL_BROWN, size = 0.60, shape = 22,
          border.col = "white", border.lwd = 2) +
  tm_text("station", col = TEL_BROWN, size = 0.60, fontface = "bold",
          xmod = 1.05, ymod = 0.10,
          bg.color = "white", bg.alpha = 0.75) +
  # Stage annotations — italic labels with white backing beside each stage
  tm_shape(tel_annotations) +
  tm_text("label", col = TEL_BROWN, size = 0.46, fontface = "italic",
          bg.color = "white", bg.alpha = 0.65) +
  # ---- Other MRT/LRT stations in the area --------------------------------- #
  tm_shape(mrt_north %>%
             filter(!station %in% nsl_all_names,
                    !station %in% tel_stage1_names)) +
  tm_dots(col = "grey55", size = 0.2, shape = 21,
          border.col = "white", border.lwd = 0.8, alpha = 0.7) +
  tm_layout(
    title          = "HDB price per sqm (northern towns)",
    title.size     = 0.85,
    title.fontface = "bold",
    title.color    = pal["nus_blue"],
    legend.outside = TRUE
  )
```






```{r map-interactive}
tmap_mode("view")

tm_shape(northern_areas) +
  tm_borders(col = "grey35", lwd = 1.8) +
  tm_shape(hdb_north_map) +
  tm_dots(
    col    = "price_psm",
    palette = c("#D6E8F7", "#2E75B6", pal["nus_blue"]),
    style  = "quantile",
    size   = 0.05,
    alpha  = 0.7,
    title  = "Price per sqm ($)",
    popup.vars = c(
      "Town"              = "town",
      "Flat type"         = "flat_type",
      "Price/sqm ($)"    = "price_psm",
      "Dist. to MRT (m)"  = "dist_to_mrt_m",
      "Nearest station"   = "nearest_station"
    )
  ) +
  # NSL dashed stubs
  tm_shape(nsl_ext_south) +
  tm_lines(col = NSL_RED, lwd = 2, lty = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
  tm_shape(nsl_ext_north) +
  tm_lines(col = NSL_RED, lwd = 2, lty = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
  # NSL solid line
  tm_shape(nsl_line_solid) +
  tm_lines(col = NSL_RED, lwd = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  # NSL stations outside the study area
  tm_shape(nsl_stations_sf %>% filter(!in_scope)) +
  tm_dots(col = "white", size = 0.1, shape = 21,
          border.col = NSL_RED, border.lwd = 1.5,
          popup.vars = c("NSL station (outside study area)" = "station")) +
  # NSL in-scope stations (excl. Woodlands interchange)
  tm_shape(nsl_stations_sf %>% filter(in_scope, station != "Woodlands")) +
  tm_dots(col = NSL_RED, size = 0.15,
          popup.vars = c("NSL station" = "station")) +
  # TEL Stage 2 dashed
  tm_shape(tel_line_stage2) +
  tm_lines(col = TEL_BROWN, lwd = 2, lty = "dashed", alpha = 0.6) +
  # TEL Stage 1 solid
  tm_shape(tel_line_stage1) +
  tm_lines(col = TEL_BROWN, lwd = 3.5, alpha = 0.95) +
  tm_shape(tel_stage1_sf %>% filter(station != "Woodlands")) +
  tm_dots(col = TEL_BROWN, size = 0.18,
          popup.vars = c("TEL Stage 1 station" = "station")) +
  # Woodlands interchange
  tm_shape(nsl_stations_sf %>% filter(station == "Woodlands")) +
  tm_dots(col = TEL_BROWN, size = 0.22, shape = 22,
          popup.vars = c("Interchange (NSL/TEL)" = "station")) +
  # Other stations
  tm_shape(mrt_north %>%
             filter(!station %in% nsl_all_names,
                    !station %in% tel_stage1_names)) +
  tm_dots(col = "grey55", size = 0.07,
          popup.vars = c("Station" = "station"))
```

```{r reset-tmap}
tmap_mode("plot")
```




```{r parallel-trends}
did_trend <- hdb %>%
  filter(town %in% c("WOODLANDS", "SEMBAWANG", "YISHUN"),
         year >= 2017) %>%
  mutate(group = if_else(town == "WOODLANDS",
                         "Woodlands (T)", "Sembawang + Yishun (C)")) %>%
  group_by(group, year) %>%
  summarise(mean_psm = mean(price_psm), .groups = "drop")
```






```{r parallel-trends2}
ggplot(did_trend, aes(x = year, y = mean_psm,
                      colour = group, group = group)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 2020, linetype = "dashed",
             colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.8) +
  annotate("label", x = 2020.1,
           y = min(did_trend$mean_psm) * 1.01,
           label = "TEL Stage 1\n31 Jan 2020",
           hjust = 0, size = 3.2, colour = "grey30",
           fill = "white", label.size = 0.3) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c("Woodlands (T)"         = pal[["nus_orange"]],
               "Sembawang + Yishun (C)" = pal[["nus_blue"]])
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2017:2025) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar_format(prefix = "$", big.mark = ","), limits=c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Comparison between the towns",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Mean price per sqm ($)",
    colour   = NULL,
    caption  = "Data: HDB."
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
```







```{r did-prep}
did_data <- hdb %>%
  filter(
    town %in% c("WOODLANDS", "SEMBAWANG", "YISHUN"),
    year %in% 2018:2021
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    treated = (town == "WOODLANDS"),
    post    = (year >= 2020)
  )

did_data %>%
  count(town, post) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = post, values_from = n,
              names_prefix = "post_") %>%
  rename(before = post_FALSE, after = post_TRUE)

glimpse(did_data)
```







```{r did-table}
did_means <- did_data %>%
  group_by(treated, post) %>%
  summarise(mean_psm = mean(price_psm), n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    group  = if_else(treated, "Woodlands (treated)",
                     "Sembawang + Yishun (control)"),
    period = if_else(post, "After (2020–21)", "Before (2018–19)")
  )

did_means %>%
  select(group, period, mean_psm, n) %>%
  mutate(mean_psm = dollar(round(mean_psm), prefix = "$")) %>%
  arrange(group, period)
```






```{r did-manual}
wide <- did_means %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = period, values_from = mean_psm, id_cols = group)

woodlands_diff <- wide$`After (2020–21)`[wide$group == "Woodlands (treated)"] -
                  wide$`Before (2018–19)`[wide$group == "Woodlands (treated)"]

control_diff   <- wide$`After (2020–21)`[wide$group == "Sembawang + Yishun (control)"] -
                  wide$`Before (2018–19)`[wide$group == "Sembawang + Yishun (control)"]

did_estimate   <- woodlands_diff - control_diff

cat("Woodlands change (before -> after):      $", round(woodlands_diff), "/sqm\n")
cat("Control towns change (before -> after):  $", round(control_diff),  "/sqm\n")
cat("DiD estimate:                            $", round(did_estimate),  "/sqm\n")
```





```{r did-regression}
did_model <- lm(price_psm ~ treated + post + treated:post, data = did_data)
summary(did_model)
```
